tools.description: Add a booking signal to the travel profile and update inferred preferences.
tools.name: add_booking

tools.description: Check if trip is viable (flights, hotels, visa, weather).
tools.name: assess_trip

tools.description: Build or refresh the travel profile from a source such as email or manual input.

source.description: Profile source: email, manual, or empty

tools.name: build_profile

tools.description: Compare paying cash vs using loyalty points for a redemption. Returns effective cents-per-point, program valuation range, and a recommendation.
tools.name: calculate_points_value

tools.description: Estimate total trip cost (flights + hotel).
tools.name: calculate_trip_cost

tools.description: Check visa and entry requirements for a passport→destination country pair. Returns visa status (visa-free, visa-required, visa-on-arrival, e-visa, freedom-of-movement), maximum stay duration, and notes. Uses ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes (e.g. FI=Finland, JP=Japan, US=United States).

passport.description: Passport country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. FI, US, GB, JP)

destination.description: Destination country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. JP, TH, US, DE)

tools.name: check_visa

tools.description: Configure an external data provider for accommodation, transport, or restaurant search. Requires explicit user consent before enabling.

field_mapping.description: Field mapping from trvl fields to provider JSON paths

browser_escape_hatch.description: Open browser when WAF cookies are required

tools.name: configure_provider

tools.description: Create a saved trip with optional initial legs.

type.description: Leg type (flight, train, bus, ferry, hotel, activity)

tools.name: create_trip

tools.description: Get destination intelligence for a city including weather, country details, holidays, safety advisory, currency exchange rates, and timezone.
tools.name: destination_info

tools.description: Detect accommodation split opportunities (booking nights separately vs together).
tools.name: detect_accommodation_hacks

tools.description: Detect money-saving travel hacks for a route, including throwaway ticketing, hidden city, positioning flights, split ticketing, overnight transport, stopover programs, and date flexibility.
tools.name: detect_travel_hacks

tools.description: Discover the cheapest flight destinations from an origin airport. Returns destinations sorted by price with airline, stops, and airport info. Use for open-ended 'where should I go' or 'show me options from X' queries. Requires only an origin; dates default to the next ~4 weeks.

origin.description: Departure airport IATA code (e.g. SEA, JFK, LHR),pattern=^[A-Z]{3}$

start_date.description: Departure date (YYYY-MM-DD); defaults to 7 days from now

tools.name: explore_destinations

tools.description: Export a saved trip to iCalendar data.
tools.name: export_ics

tools.description: Interactive flight hunt that can ask the user to relax filters when zero results come back. Runs full pipeline, elicits filter relaxation on zero results, streams progress, uses sampling to break ties between close-ranked bundles.

origin.description: Origin IATA code(s), comma-separated, or 'home' to expand from preferences.home_airports

cabin.description: Cabin class: economy, premium_economy, business, first

no_early_connection.description: Drop flights whose post-overnight leg departs before preferences.early_connection_floor (default 10:00)

lounge_required.description: Drop flights where a layover airport lacks lounge coverage from user's cards

tools.name: find_interactive

tools.description: Find optimal travel windows by intersecting price calendars with calendar constraints.
tools.name: find_trip_window

tools.description: Look up carry-on and checked baggage allowances for airlines. Covers full-service European carriers (KLM, Finnair, Lufthansa, BA, etc.), Gulf carriers (Emirates, Qatar, Singapore), and low-cost carriers (Ryanair, Wizz Air, easyJet, etc.). Pass airline IATA code for a specific airline, or "all" to list all.

airline_code.description: IATA airline code (e.g. KL, FR, U2) or "all" to list all airlines

tools.name: get_baggage_rules

tools.description: Read the saved travel preferences profile.
tools.name: get_preferences

tools.description: Get a saved trip by ID.
tools.name: get_trip

tools.description: Get a weather forecast for any city using Open-Meteo (free, no API key). Returns up to 14 days of daily forecasts with temperature, precipitation, and conditions.
tools.name: get_weather

tools.description: Get prices from multiple booking providers for a specific hotel.

hotel_id.description: Google Hotels property ID from search_hotels results

tools.name: hotel_prices

tools.description: Get guest reviews for a specific hotel from Google Hotels.

hotel_id.description: Google Hotels property ID from search_hotels results

tools.name: hotel_reviews

tools.description: Search room types and per-night pricing for a specific hotel by name.

booking_url.description: Booking.com hotel URL from search_hotels results

tools.name: hotel_rooms

tools.description: Start a structured interview about a real trip to infer travel preferences.
tools.name: interview_trip

tools.description: List saved rolling opportunity watches.
tools.name: list_opportunity_watches

tools.description: List all configured external data providers with their status, consent, and error counts.
tools.name: list_providers

tools.description: List saved trips.
tools.name: list_trips

tools.description: Find events in a city.
tools.name: local_events

tools.description: Mark a saved trip as booked with provider and reference details.
tools.name: mark_trip_booked

tools.description: Find nearby POIs by lat/lon.
tools.name: nearby_places

tools.description: Run a phased travel profile onboarding interview.
tools.name: onboard_profile

tools.description: Find cheapest booking strategies with alternatives.
tools.name: optimize_booking

tools.description: Find cheapest order for visiting multiple cities.
tools.name: optimize_multi_city

tools.description: Find cheapest dates across a date range.
tools.name: optimize_trip_dates

tools.description: Run the full flight search pipeline and return ranked bundles.
tools.name: plan_flight_bundle

tools.description: Plan a complete trip with outbound flights, return flights, and hotel options in one search. Returns top options for each plus a total cost summary.
tools.name: plan_trip

tools.description: Show per-provider health statistics from the local health log.
tools.name: provider_health

tools.description: Remove a configured external data provider by ID.
tools.name: remove_provider

tools.description: Find ground transport from an airport to a destination.

destination.description: Hotel, address, district, or city destination

tools.name: search_airport_transfers

tools.description: Find cross-program award sweet spots from supplied award-seat fixtures, point balances, and optional transfer ratios.
tools.name: search_awards

tools.description: Find cheapest dates to fly.

trip_duration.description: Trip duration in days for round-trip searches,minimum=1

tools.name: search_dates

tools.description: Find travel deals.
tools.name: search_deals

tools.description: Search flights via Google Flights, and on compatible one-way searches also include Kiwi virtual-interlining results with explicit self-connect warnings. Returns real-time pricing, durations, stops, and leg details for a given route and date. IMPORTANT: call get_preferences before your first search in a conversation to load the user's home airport and flight preferences. If the profile is empty, interview the user first — get_preferences returns instructions. Use home_airports as default origin when the user doesn't specify where from.

origin.description: Departure airport IATA code (e.g., HEL, JFK) or city name (e.g., Paris, Tokyo). Must be a real airport or city — do not pass placeholders like NEARBY, ANY, or FLEXIBLE.

destination.description: Arrival airport IATA code (e.g., NRT, LAX) or city name (e.g., London, Barcelona). Must be a real airport or city — do not pass placeholders like NEARBY, ANY, or FLEXIBLE.

alliances.description: Filter by airline alliance (comma-separated): STAR_ALLIANCE, ONEWORLD, SKYTEAM (default: no filter)

max_price.description: Maximum price in whole currency units,minimum=0

max_duration.description: Maximum total flight duration in minutes,minimum=0

exclude_basic.description: Exclude basic economy fares (default: false). Server-side filter.

less_emissions.description: Only show flights with lower CO2 emissions (default: false)

carry_on_bags.description: Require N carry-on bags included in price,minimum=0

require_checked_bag.description: Only show flights with ≥1 free checked bag included (default: false). Client-side post-filter on response data.

min_layover_minutes.description: Only keep flights with a layover of at least N minutes,minimum=0

layover_at.description: Restrict qualifying layovers to these IATA codes (comma-separated, empty = any airport). Post-fetch filter.

no_early_connection.description: Drop flights whose post-overnight leg departs before preferences.early_connection_floor (default 10:00).

lounge_required.description: Drop flights where a layover airport lacks lounge coverage from user's cards.

first_result.description: Return only the first result with a valid price after sorting. Combine with sort_by to get e.g. the shortest priced flight (duration) or cheapest. Default: false.

provider.description: Flight provider (empty/default/google/google_flights/kiwi=default merged search, skiplagged=Skiplagged MCP).

tools.name: search_flights

tools.description: Find buses, trains, ferries between cities.
tools.name: search_ground

tools.description: Rank priced hidden-city matrix offers. Requires explicit allow_hidden_city=true because checked bags, return legs, and airline account risk make this strategy unsafe unless the user accepts those constraints.
tools.name: search_hidden_city

tools.description: Find hotel by name.
tools.name: search_hotel_by_name

tools.description: Search hotels via Google Hotels, Trivago, optionally Booking.com when configured, and any user-configured external providers. Returns real-time pricing, ratings, star levels, and amenities.

max_distance.description: Maximum distance from city center in km,minimum=0

enrich_amenities.description: Fetch detail pages for top results to get full amenity lists

free_cancellation.description: Only show hotels with free cancellation

max_distance_m.description: Maximum distance from city center in meters,minimum=0

meal_plan.description: Only show properties with breakfast or meals included

tools.name: search_hotels

tools.description: Find airport lounges at a given airport.
tools.name: search_lounges

tools.description: Find restaurants in a city.
tools.name: search_restaurants

tools.description: Find multi-modal routes combining flights, trains, buses, and ferries.

origin.description: Origin city name or IATA code

destination.description: Destination city name or IATA code

tools.name: search_route

tools.description: Find cheapest dates around target date.
tools.name: suggest_dates

tools.description: Return a catalog of external data providers that can be enabled for additional hotels, ground, restaurant, and review sources.
tools.name: suggest_providers

tools.description: Test a configured provider by making a single search request and returning detailed diagnostics.
tools.name: test_provider

tools.description: Test tool that reports progress notifications
tools.name: test_tool_with_progress

tools.description: Get travel guide for a city.
tools.name: travel_guide

tools.description: Update saved travel preferences by merging the provided fields into the existing profile.
tools.name: update_preferences

tools.description: Update a saved trip. Any field provided directly replaces the current value.

type.description: Leg type (flight, train, bus, ferry, hotel, activity)

tools.name: update_trip

tools.description: Create an opportunity watch that monitors a rolling travel window for deal candidates to favourite destinations.
tools.name: watch_opportunities

tools.description: Create a flight or hotel price watch with a target alert price.
tools.name: watch_price

tools.description: Monitor a specific hotel for room availability matching criteria keywords.

keywords.description: Room keywords that must all match

tools.name: watch_room_availability

tools.description: Find cheap weekend destinations from an origin airport for exact travel dates. Requires departure_date and return_date in YYYY-MM-DD format; nights are inferred from the dates.
tools.name: weekend_getaway
